During our review of the accounts for January and February 2026, we discovered the following errors in the general ledger that need to be corrected: 1. A purchase of office furniture for NOK 4200 was booked on account 6540 (office supplies), but should have been on account 6860 (furniture). 2. A cleaning expense of NOK 1250 was recorded twice on account 6860. 3. A vendor invoice for NOK 10200 (excl. VAT) was posted to account 6540 without a corresponding VAT entry on account 2710. 4. A utility expense on account 6540 was posted for NOK 16800, but the correct amount should be NOK 15550.
